\tzpentry{ID3861}{Transfer Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3861 introduces Transfer Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{T}_{\pi,\phi_c}[s] := \mathrm{sgn}!\left(\pi(s-1)-\phi_c\right), \end{equation}
